name: Curly Whip
notes:
Option: Man can turn slightly R on step 1, leading Lady to turn R. (Lady 1/4 to R to a 90 degree angle to Man on his R side.)
Option: Man turns Lady more strongly L over steps 2-5 (Lady turns 3/4 to L.)
Raise L arm and circle hand in a counter‑clockwise direction. Loosen R hand hold on Lady's back for Lady to turn within circle of arm. Regain normal hold at end of Lady's turn.

comments: Lower and extend L arm fwd.

steps.action: Replace weight to RF, start to turn R
comments: Option: Man can turn slightly R on step 1, leading Lady to turn R. (Lady 1/4 to R to a 90 degree angle to Man on his R side.)
Option: Man turns Lady more strongly L over steps 2-5 (Lady turns 3/4 to L.)
